CreateAwsLogSource.description: Grants permission to enable any source type in any region for accounts that are either part of a trusted organization or standalone account

CreateCustomLogSource.description: Grants permission to add a custom source

CreateDataLake.description: Grants permission to create a new security data lake

CreateDataLakeExceptionSubscription.description: Grants permission to get instant notifications about exceptions. Subscribes to the SNS topics for exception notifications

CreateDataLakeOrganizationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to automatically enable Amazon Security Lake for new member accounts in your organization

CreateSubscriber.description: Grants permission to create a subscriber

CreateSubscriberNotification.description: Grants permission to create a webhook invocation to notify a client when there is new data in the data lake

DeleteAwsLogSource.description: Grants permission to disable any source type in any region for accounts that are part of a trusted organization or standalone accounts

DeleteCustomLogSource.description: Grants permission to remove a custom source

DeleteDataLake.description: Grants permission to delete security data lake

DeleteDataLakeExceptionSubscription.description: Grants permission to unsubscribe from SNS topics for exception notifications. Removes exception notifications for the SNS topic

DeleteDataLakeOrganizationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to remove the automatic enablement of Amazon Security Lake access for new organization accounts

DeleteSubscriber.description: Grants permission to delete the specified subscriber

DeleteSubscriberNotification.description: Grants permission to remove a webhook invocation to notify a client when there is new data in the data lake

DeregisterDataLakeDelegatedAdministrator.description: Grants permission to remove the Delegated Administrator account and disable Amazon Security Lake as a service for this organization

GetDataLakeExceptionSubscription.description: Grants permission to query the protocol and endpoint that were provided when subscribing to SNS topics for exception notifications

GetDataLakeOrganizationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to get an organization's configuration setting for automatically enabling Amazon Security Lake access for new organization accounts

GetDataLakeSources.description: Grants permission to get a static snapshot of the security data lake in the current region. The snapshot includes enabled accounts and log sources

GetSubscriber.description: Grants permission to get information about subscriber that is already created

ListDataLakeExceptions.description: Grants permission to get the list of all non-retryable failures

ListDataLakes.description: Grants permission to list information about the security data lakes

ListLogSources.description: Grants permission to view the enabled accounts. You can view the enabled sources in the enabled regions

ListSubscribers.description: Grants permission to list all subscribers

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list all tags for the resource

RegisterDataLakeDelegatedAdministrator.description: Grants permission to designate an account as the Amazon Security Lake administrator account for the organization

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to the resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from the resource

UpdateDataLake.description: Grants permission to update a security data lake

UpdateDataLakeExceptionSubscription.description: Grants permission to update subscriptions to the SNS topics for exception notifications

UpdateSubscriberNotification.description: Grants permission to update a webhook invocation to notify a client when there is new data in the data lake

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request
